title: The Road Ahead — Why Europe Can't Agree on Electric

ev.source: Pucher & Sandhu 2024, MDPI Sustainability 16(17):7529 (342 EU EV models)

petrol.source: EU new-car ~5.6 L (ODYSSEE/IEA) apportioned + real-world gap +23.7% (EC OBFCM COM(2024)122)

diesel.source: EU new-car (ODYSSEE/IEA) apportioned + real-world gap +18.1% (EC OBFCM COM(2024)122)

formula: EUR/100km = energy price x consumption per 100km

sources.electricity: Eurostat nrg_pc_204 (band DC, all taxes incl.)
sources.fuel_prices: EU Weekly Oil Bulletin (per-country current; EU-level history)
sources.charging: EAFO recharging points (AFIR, 2026) per 100k inhabitants (population: Eurostat 2024)
sources.gdp: Eurostat tec00114 (GDP per capita PPS, EU=100, 2025)
sources.consumption_ev: Pucher & Sandhu 2024, MDPI Sustainability 16(17):7529 (342 EU EV models)
sources.consumption_fuel: EC OBFCM real-world gap COM(2024)122 + ODYSSEE/IEA WLTP baseline
